steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Clear fractions: $-5x+14y=\tfrac{32}{7}$ and $5x-4py=8$. For no solution, coefficients must be proportional: $$\frac{5}{-5}=\frac{-4p}{14}.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: This gives $-1=\tfrac{-4p}{14}$, so $4p=14$ and $p=3.5$. The constants differ, confirming no solution. The answer is 3.5.
